ess_tf_dir.description: The directory where the Terraform files are located.

ess_stack_version.description: The version of the stack to deploy.

ess_ccs_enabled.description: True to enable Cross Cluster Search (CCS).

ess_ccs_remote_cluster_name_vault.description: The name of the secret in Google Cloud Secret Manager that contains the remote cluster name.

ess_ccs_remote_cluster_id.description: The ID of the remote cluster.

ess_not_allow_settings.description: True to disable some settings not allowed in staging.

ess_credentials.description: The credentials to access the Elastic Cloud service.

ess_api_key.description: The API key to access the Elastic Cloud service

ess_org_id.description: The organization ID to access the Elastic Cloud service.

ess_gcs_credentials.description: The name of the secret in Google Cloud Secret Manager that contains the credentials to access the Google Cloud Storage service.
